topics.title: Visualization with Python
topics.description: Comprehensive guide to data visualization in Python—from static charts to interactive dashboards.

libraries.name: Altair
libraries.use: Declarative Vega-Lite, clean grammar of graphics

concepts: Line, bar, scatter, histogram, box, violin plots
topics.codeSnippet:
import plotly.express as px
df = px.data.iris()
fig = px.scatter(df, x='sepal_width', y='sepal_length', color='species')
fig.show()

topics.title: Vibe Coding
topics.description: AI-augmented development—build faster with Copilot, Claude, Cursor, and prompt-driven workflows.
concepts: What is vibe coding: rapid prototyping with AI pair programming
Iterative refinement: describe → generate → review → refine
When to trust AI output vs. when to verify
bestPractices: Be specific: include context, constraints, tech stack
Always run and test generated code
Use AI for boilerplate; write critical logic yourself
topics.codeSnippet:
# Prompt: 'Write a FastAPI endpoint that accepts JSON, validates with Pydantic, and returns formatted response'
# AI generates endpoint + model + validation

topics.title: SaaS Development with Python
topics.description: Build and ship Software-as-a-Service products: architecture, billing, multi-tenancy, and deployment.
topics.codeSnippet:
# Stripe subscription example
import stripe
stripe.Subscription.create(customer=customer_id, items=[{'price': price_id}])

topics.title: DevOps with Python
topics.description: CI/CD, containerization, infrastructure as code, and deployment automation with Python.
concepts: CI/CD: GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins
topics.codeSnippet:
# GitHub Actions: run pytest on push
# .github/workflows/test.yml
# jobs: test -> runs: pip install pytest && pytest
pipeline: Commit → Lint (ruff, black) → Test (pytest) → Build (Docker) → Deploy
